title: ISTUN Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar's book chapter was published in the book 'Integrated Practices and Care in Women's Health'
content:
ISTUN Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar's book chapter was published in the book 'Integrated Practices and Care in Women's Health'

Çarşamba

ISTUN Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar's book chapter titled "Phytotherapy' was published in the book 'Integrated Practices and Care in Women's Health"

We congratulate our faculty member and wish him continued success.
